children.heading: Federal National Mortgage Association and Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation
children.label: a Federal National Mortgage Association and Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation
children.text: No class of equity securities of the Federal National Mortgage Association or the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation shall be treated as an exempted security for purposes of section 78, 78m, 78n, or 78p of this title.l

children.heading: Registration
children.label: 1 Registration
children.text: Each Federal Home Loan Bank shall register a class of its common stock under section 78(g) of this title, not later than 120 days after , and shall thereafter maintain such registration and be treated for purposes of this chapter as an “issuer”, the securities of which are required to be registered under section 78 of this title, regardless of the number of members holding such stock at any given time.llJuly 30, 2008

children.heading: Standards relating to audit committees
children.label: 2 Standards relating to audit committees
children.text: Each Federal Home Loan Bank shall comply with the rules issued by the Commission under .section 78j–1(m) of this title

children.heading: Federal Home Loan Bank; member
children.label: 1 Federal Home Loan Bank; member
children.text: The terms “Federal Home Loan Bank” and “member”, have the same meanings as in .section 1422 of title 12

children.heading: Federal National Mortgage Association
children.label: 2 Federal National Mortgage Association
children.text: The term “Federal National Mortgage Association” means the corporation created by the Federal National Mortgage Association Charter Act [ et seq.].12 U.S.C. 1716

children.heading: Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation
children.label: 3 Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation
children.text: The term “Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation” means the corporation created by the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation Act [ et seq.].12 U.S.C. 1451
